Composition: subject placed in the lower third, occupying 35–50% of the frame, with large clean negative space above like a plain sky/wall for an email top banner. Lighting: gentle morning window light, soft and diffused, no lens flare. Color palette: forest green accents (e.g., ceramic cup or table detail), kraft brown elements (journal cover or tabletop), antique white pages, subtle copper highlights (pen clip or small object). Medium-format look, 50mm lens, f/4, ISO 100, shallow depth of field, premium calm post-processing, color-consistent, low contrast, not overly saturated. No text, no logos, no copy overlays, no cartoon style, avoid stock-photo clichés.
